posts.title: 剑指offer41-数据流中的中位数
posts.text: 下面是我的解答： 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536class Solution {private: std::priority_queue<int> left_big_heap; std::priority_queue<int, std::vector<int>, std::greater<int> > right_small_heap; int size = 0; public: void Insert(int num) { size += 1; if (size % 2 == 0){ if(num <= right_small_heap.top()) left_big_heap.push(num); else { left_big_heap.push(right_small_heap.top()); right_small_heap.pop(); right_small_heap.push(num); } } else { if(num >= left_big_heap.top() || size == 1) right_small_heap.push(num); else { right_small_heap.push(left_big_heap.top()); left_big_heap.pop(); left_big_heap.push(num); } } } double GetMedian() { double median = 0; double left_top = (left_big_heap.size()>0) ? left_big_heap.top() : 0; double right_bottom = right_small_heap.top(); if(size % 2 == 0) median = (left_top+right_bottom)/2; else median = right_bottom; return median; }};

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: 你好！这是我的第一篇测试博客。
